title: H2A-Commercial Profile — Exposure
description: Optional commercial profile (SPEC-COMMERCIAL). NOT a Core conformance requirement (ADR-012): a Core-conformant implementation is not required to support it, and a verifier that does not implement it MUST ignore the grant's 'exposure' field. Defines the exposure declaration carried on a grant's optional 'exposure' field (and snapshotted on a Decision Record's 'exposure_snapshot'). Money objects carry their own ISO-4217 currency, so the profile is inherently multi-currency; no cross-currency conversion is defined. remedy_basis is locked to 'service_credit': any value implying indemnity would change the legal character of the instrument (ADR-011, and SPEC-COMMERCIAL prevention-not-indemnity rule).

amount.description: Amount in major units of the currency.

per_act_limit.description: Per-claim cap: the maximum remedy on any single governed act. Does NOT enter the premium base (ADR-011 §2).

aggregate_limit.description: Annual aggregate limit: the premium base. premium = aggregate_limit.amount x rate(assurance_level). A cap on total service credits in the period, not a promise to pay.

assurance_level.description: The unified assurance/conformance level in force: L1 software attestation (= Verifiable), L2 witnessed attestation (= Attested), L3 enclave attestation (= Anchored). Same ladder as CONFORMANCE.md, priced (ADR-011).

committed_horizon_ms.description: Committed revocation horizon for this assurance level, in milliseconds.

remedy_basis.description: Locked to service_credit. Single-value enum by design: any value implying indemnity changes the legal character of the instrument and MUST NOT be added without the conversation recorded in ADR-011.
